{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Shield of the Titan
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Shield of the Titan]] is a bulwark of gleaming [[steel]] with red-hot veins like molten metal.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
